calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2026 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Continued To May-12-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-03-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:51am and concluding at 10:29am.

Plaintiffs Margarita Soc and Sergio Giron appearing represented by Carlos Jato, Esq.
Defendant Teodoro Hernandez not appearing.

Plaintiffs were assisted by Spanish Interpreter Patrice Binaisa

Court addresses Counsel for Plaintiff re: it's request for attorney fees. Court reviews declaration of counsel re: attorney fees.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiffs SERGIO GIRON AND MARGARITA SOC and they confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiffs Sergio Giron and Margarita Soc, and against Defendant Teodoro Hernandez, as follows:

Damages: $200,000.00
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $9,100.00
Costs: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $209,100.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-25-2026 Continued To Apr-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Margarita Soc appearing in court represented by Carlos Jato, Esq.
Defendant Teodoro Hernandez not appearing.

Mr. Jato was informed this department did not receive any courtesy copies of the relevant documents prior to this hearing.

This matter is continued to April 3, 2026 at 9:00am to allow the Plaintiff an oppertunity to send courtesy copies.
